'''dhazasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilcup|oilcup]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilcup|oilcup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzæshæth|dhæzæshæth]] || [[word:dhæzæshæj|dhæzæshæj]] || [[word:dhæzæshæsh|dhæzæshæsh]] || [[word:dhæzæshæ|dhæzæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazazashath|dhazazashath]] || [[word:dhazazashaj|dhazazashaj]] || [[word:dhazazashash|dhazazashash]] || [[word:dhazazasha|dhazazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazashath|dhazashath]] || [[word:dhazashaj|dhazashaj]] || [[word:dhazashash|dhazashash]] || [[word:dhazasha|dhazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazafshath|dhazafshath]] || [[word:dhazafshaj|dhazafshaj]] || [[word:dhazafshash|dhazafshash]] || [[word:dhazafshaf|dhazafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazashatha|dhazashatha]] || [[word:dhazashaja|dhazashaja]] || [[word:dhazashasha|dhazashasha]] || [[word:dhazashaka|dhazashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazashath|dhazashath]] || [[word:dhazashaj|dhazashaj]] || [[word:dhazashash|dhazashash]] || [[word:dhazasha|dhazasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazashathal|dhazashathal]] || [[word:dhazashajal|dhazashajal]] || [[word:dhazashashal|dhazashashal]] || [[word:dhazashakal|dhazashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazashathatha|dhazashathatha]] || [[word:dhazashajaja|dhazashajaja]] || [[word:dhazashashasha|dhazashashasha]] || [[word:dhazashaka|dhazashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazashathan|dhazashathan]] || [[word:dhazashajan|dhazashajan]] || [[word:dhazashashan|dhazashashan]] || [[word:dhazashakan|dhazashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazashathaoro|dhazashathaoro]] || [[word:dhazashajaoro|dhazashajaoro]] || [[word:dhazashashaoro|dhazashashaoro]] || [[word:dhazashakaoro|dhazashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
